summary: Executed backend-only contract regression for requested v1 admin/patient/queue APIs against public deployment. Contract mismatch is severe: 10/13 tests failed and key endpoints/actions do not match expected implementation.

critical.issue: Returns 404 Endpoint not found instead of success token payload.
Returns 404 Endpoint not found; admin overview/clinics/doctors contract unavailable.
Returns 400 Invalid inputs for valid {patientId, gender, examType} payload expected by new contract.
Returns 400 Missing clinicId, indicating old API shape and no patient journey contract.
All unavailable due to endpoint 404; doctor lifecycle cannot be executed.
Unavailable due to 404 on admin endpoint.
Blocked by missing doctor login/admin endpoint; doctor dashboard contract untestable on current deployment.

minor.issue: Returns non-standard legacy payload ({"0": {...}, "success": true) without expected data.clinicId/patient contract.
Returns legacy payload structure; expected transferred clinic contract missing.

action_items: Deploy the updated API implementation that includes /api/v1/admin/status with admin_login/doctor_login and authenticated admin actions.
Point tests to the correct public environment for this branch (current public URL appears to serve an older backend contract).
Normalize /api/v1/queue/call response shape to the unified {success, data} contract.
Provide /app/memory/test_credentials.md (missing) per auth-testing requirement for future agents.
critical_code_review_comments: Public deployed API contract is out of sync with repository handlers in /app/api/v1/* (major release/deployment mismatch).
Auth testing prerequisite file /app/memory/test_credentials.md is missing, which violates testing playbook and increases credential drift risk.
Queue call endpoint currently exposes inconsistent payload schema, creating frontend/backend integration fragility.
seed_data_creation: Created runtime test IDs and attempted doctor lifecycle payloads via API only; no direct DB seeding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_v1_queue_admin_contract.py with API_BASE set to target deployment. Current run used https://www.mmc-mms.com and showed old/legacy API behavior incompatible with requested features.
rca of the issue: Root cause is primarily environment/contract mismatch: repository contains new Supabase-backed handlers, but tested public endpoint serves older API (404 for /admin/status and legacy queue payloads). Reproduction: run pytest with API_BASE=https://www.mmc-mms.com. Mitigation: deploy current branch APIs to the same public URL (or provide correct target URL for this branch), then rerun full contract suite.
